compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect prior-art search framework
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and relevant project documentation to document the prior-art search framework and its integration points.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the framework — what it is, where it lives, which skills reference it, and how the tiered search protocol works.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section update, any other existing docs that reference fix-bug investigation or agent search behavior
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md architecture section documents the prior-art search framework, its location, and its integration points in fix-bug, resolution sub-agent, and sprint
  ← Satisfies: project documentation accuracy

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Story complete: CLAUDE.md updated with prior-art search framework documentation
comments.author: Test
